items.title: Republican Learning: John Toland and the Crisis of Christian Culture, 1696-1722. Manchester: Manchester University Press, 2003
items.author: Champion, Justin
items.why: This book explores the implications of covenant transitions in the context of Christian thought.
items.description: This book explores the implications of covenant transitions in the context of Christian thought.
items.citation: Champion, Justin. *Republican Learning: John Toland and the Crisis of Christian Culture, 1696-1722*. Manchester: Manchester University Press, 2003.

items.title: The Fulfillment of Prediction
items.why: This article discusses how Jesus is portrayed as the fulfillment of Old Testament predictions and themes, aligning closely with the claims about Jesus fulfilling Old Testament figures and the transition from the old covenant to the new as depicted in the Gospel of John. It also touches on the significance of belief and love in the context of God's covenant people, making it a comprehensive source for the given claims.
